## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages or tracebacks.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 24.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.2]
- Chronos version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- Installation method: [source / pip]

paste log output here if applicable
